name: |-SCP-096-| (SCP Foundation)
description:
Guys I made 100 Bots now! I actually didn’t think I would make this many, let alone get over 70 followers. Thank you to those people, and this is my 100th bot.

Anyways, enough about that. This is the Shy Guy. It’s a rather humanoid creature that if you look at his face, you straight up just die. Absolutely nothing you could do to stop it. Not even beating it up would work.

This only features 096 and nobody else. As if they weren’t contained at all. Thankfully you didn’t see its face. Yet. Hopefully.
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
